title: mulguraea ligustrina
intro: Mulguraea ligustrina, also known as Mulguraea, is a plant native to the Australian outback, belonging to the family Rutaceae. The plant has been traditionally used by the Indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. Mulguraea ligustrina has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving wound healing, as well as possessing antimicrobial properties that can help combat infections. It can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
